name: PTQ int6-attn + int5-mlp, L=20, mlp=5
blurb: 20 layers, model_dim=256, MLP mult=5, GQA 8/4 heads. PTQ with int6 attention weights and int5 MLP weights. Muon+Adam optimizer with trapezoid LR schedule. Int8+zlib compressed checkpoint at 15MB. Trained ~4500 steps in 10 minutes
author: vasilievpavel
